description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house with a U-shaped layout, featuring a central circular driveway and landscaped gardens at the front. The exterior is predominantly white with dark gray roofing, and the structure includes multiple wings and sections, some with flat roofs and others with gabled forms. The property is enclosed by a dark perimeter wall and includes a spacious backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, sun loungers, and paved patio areas. Large windows are arranged in symmetrical rows, providing ample natural light to the interior. The main entrance is accentuated by a roundabout, a covered porch, and decorative columns, giving the house a stately appearance. The grounds are landscaped with trees, shrubs, and flowerbeds, enhancing the overall curb appeal.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a U-shaped layout, circular driveway, landscaped gardens, and a backyard pool. The exterior features white walls, dark gray roofs, and symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular driveway, main entrance with columns, landscaped gardens, and the front facade with symmetrical windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the U-shaped layout, garage area, and the transition between the front garden and backyard spaces.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the spacious backyard, large swimming pool, sun loungers, and extensive patio area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, secondary entrance, and additional landscaping along the perimeter wall.
attribute_entryway_design: Central covered porch with columns, double doors, circular driveway, and landscaped approach
